case_title: DREYER, LAPIDOS, GEYER & LEUNG , INC. VS DARWIN MOTORS CORP.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,615.00 FILED BY DREYER, LAPIDOS, GEYER & LEUNG , INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DARWIN MOTORS CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PLTFF'S REQUEST FOR AN ORDERED CONTINUANCE FOR THE WEEK OF 8/30/04-9/3/04;PAID $10 CHECK(VIA MAIL),TO FOLDER FOR THE COMM'S DETERMINATION.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-23-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-27-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR DEFENDANT TO REVIEW SUBPOENAED DOCUMENTS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DREYER, LAPIDOS, GEYER & LEUNG , INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DARWIN MOTORS CORP. $3,485.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,507.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DARWIN MOTORS CORP.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM AUG-13-2004 TO SEP-02-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

ORIGINAL SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM SERVED ON JACK LAPIDOS ON 3/16/04, FILED.
